action.content: Expression: The target grid has a continuous vertical line of "X"s in the second column from the left, with the middle three rows forming a solid block of "X"s in the first, second, third, and fifth columns, creating a symmetric pattern of filled cells on all rows except the empty cells in the third and fourth columns of the second and fourth rows.
